arts.ttl: Aston Villa identify Jhon Duran replacement ahead of summer
arts.sum: Aston Villa have are targeting a deal for Porto striker Samu Aghehowa as a potential replacement for Jhon Duran. Villa sanctioned the sale of Duran during the January transfer window with the forward joining Al Nassr in a deal worth €77m (£63.7m). Unai Emery’s team also turned down a £60m proposal from Arsenal for fellow […] The post Aston Villa identify Jhon Duran replacement ahead of summer first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Maresca targets top-four finish, blames injuries and urges Chelsea fans to back players
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca is targeting a top-four finish and is confident his Chelsea side will bounce back from a poor run of results. The Blues have slipped to sit sixth in the Premier League table, having won just two of their six games so far in 2025. Speaking ahead of a tough trip to high-flying Aston […] The post Maresca targets top-four finish, blames injuries and urges Chelsea fans to back players appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Europa League and Conference League draws - LIVE: Man United, Tottenham, Chelsea and Rangers to learn last-16 opponents
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for Europa League and Conference League draws. Man United, Spurs and Chelsea all made it through to the latter stages of European competition.

arts.ttl: Chelsea learn extent of Noni Madueke hamstring injury
arts.sum: Chelsea winger Noni Madueke is set for several weeks on the sidelines with a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez miss, Liverpool's transfer mission and how it will impact Chelsea's striker search
arts.sum: Having the lure of Champions League football is a bargaining tool for clubs in the transfer window, with the sort of strikers Chelsea and Liverpool will be targeting wanting to play in Europe's elite competition. That in itself spells bad news for Chelsea, who are in a similar position to the table-topping Reds, thus making the Blues' need to qualify for next season's UEFA Champions League all that more important.

arts.ttl: Maresca clarifies Chelsea targets as Premier League top four race intensifies
arts.sum: Previously this season Maresca has claimed that there was no such immediate pressure to finish in the top four, saying that, “the target was in two years to play [in the] Champions League." He has also said that his side “are going to try our best to finish where this club belongs, back in the Champions League," as well. Enzo Maresca has clarified Chelsea's target this season is to finish in the top four of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Conference League draw LIVE - How to watch and start time as Chelsea learn last-16 opponents - football.london
arts.sum: In the third tier of European football, Chelsea now know who they could face after the play-off matches concluded on Thursday night. Hello and welcome to football.london's live coverage of the Conference League last-16 draw.

arts.ttl: Chelsea need fan backing for top 4 spot - Maresca
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has urged fans not to protest against Chelsea's ownership and said victory in all seven home games will secure Champions League qualification.

arts.ttl: 'Hopefully': Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca makes claim about Tyrique George after Noni Madueke's injury
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has been speaking about Chelsea youngster Tyrique George in his pre-match press conference ahead of Saturday’s trip to Aston Villa in the Premier...

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca demands anger from his squad ahead of Aston Villa fixture
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca suggests that he wants an angry squad at his disposal ahead of Saturday's Premier League fixture at Aston Villa.
